cases.description: 0 is outside CHAR's documented valid range of 1-255 -> #VALUE!
cases.expected_note: Microsoft docs: CHAR takes "A number between 1 and 255 specifying which character you want." Source: https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/char-function-bbd249c8-b36e-4a91-8017-1c133f9b837a

cases.description: 256 is above CHAR's documented valid range of 1-255 -> #VALUE!
cases.expected_note: Source: https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/char-function-bbd249c8-b36e-4a91-8017-1c133f9b837a - valid range is 1-255; values outside it are invalid
